text: Tips Understanding a few local travel tips can enhance the experience of exploring Rawalpindi’s attractions. Firstly, bargaining is common, especially in markets and for transport fares, so it’s advisable to negotiate prices politely. Secondly, while public transportation is available, it’s recommended to have small denominations of cash for fares, as many drivers may not have change for larger bills.
